ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "game_developer" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the game */,
  "game_publisher" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher who published the game */,
  "game_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was released */,
  "game_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "game_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the leaderboard belongs to */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "ranking_system" TEXT /* Ranking system used for the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of leaderboard (e.g., global, regional, friends) */,
  "leaderboard_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of entries in the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_refresh_rate" TEXT /* Frequency at which the leaderboard is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the score belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who achieved the score */,
  "score" INTEGER /* The score achieved by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the score was achieved */,
  "score_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the score in the leaderboard */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., single-player, multiplayer) */,
  "score_platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the score was achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin, moderator) */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "user_country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the tournament belongs to */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., single-elimination, round-robin) */,
  "tournament_prize" TEXT /* Prize for the tournament */,
  "tournament_status" TEXT /* Status of the tournament (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "tournament_registrations_open" TEXT /* Date when tournament registrations open */,
  "tournament_registrations_close" TEXT /* Date when tournament registrations close */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the participant is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the tournament */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the tournament */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., registered, disqualified) */,
  "participant_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the tournament */,
  "participant_score" INTEGER /* Score of the participant in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., tournament invite, friend request) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friends" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the friendship */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was added as a friend */,
  "friendship_date" TEXT /* Date the friendship was established */,
  "friend_status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted) */,
  "friend_request_date" TEXT /* Date the friendship request was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friends_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., game_mode, game_difficulty) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., configuration, settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_metadata_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_patches" (
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the patch belongs to */,
  "patch_name" TEXT /* Name of the patch */,
  "patch_date" TEXT /* Date the patch was released */,
  "patch_notes_url" TEXT /* URL to the patch notes */,
  "patch_version" TEXT /* Version of the patch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_patches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patch_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch note */,
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patch the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Content of the patch note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., bug fix, feature addition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patch_notes_patch_id FOREIGN KEY ("patch_id") REFERENCES game_patches ("patch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the profile */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "user_level" INTEGER /* Level of the user */,
  "user_experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the user */,
  "user_badges" TEXT /* Badges earned by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made progress */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the progress belongs to */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress made by the user (e.g., level completed, achievement unlocked) */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was made */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the progress (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_progress_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who achieved the achievement */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the achievement belongs to */,
  "achievement" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was unlocked */,
  "achievement_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
